name: KubernetesClusterCredential
description: Kubernetes cluster credential supporting inline (provider-specific credentials) and runner (in-cluster ServiceAccount) authentication modes.

fields.name: auth_mode
fields.description: Authentication mode. inline: provider-specific credentials build a kubeconfig; runner: uses in-cluster ServiceAccount token.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration deployed in the target cluster. Required when auth_mode=runner.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Kubernetes provider type. Required in all auth modes.

fields.name: gcp_gke
fields.description: GKE-specific credentials. Required when auth_mode=inline and provider=gcp_gke.

fields.name: cluster_ca_data
fields.description: Base64-encoded cluster CA certificate for TLS verification.

fields.name: service_account_key_base64
fields.description: Base64-encoded Google Service Account JSON key for GKE authentication.

fields.name: digital_ocean_doks
fields.description: DOKS-specific credentials. Required when auth_mode=inline and provider=digital_ocean_doks.

fields.name: kube_config
fields.description: Complete kubeconfig YAML for the DOKS cluster.
